version_notes: v1.0.0 is the job-hunter family learning-loop member, carved from the v5.2.0 monolith's Phase 0 (read the four .job-hunter learning-loop files) + Phase 5 (close the loop). Owns harvest_outcomes.py (read-side pattern detection with the >=5-closed-outcomes cold-start guard; 3 load-bearing tests incl. test_three_outcomes_below_threshold_returns_no_op + test_parse_skips_template_preamble) and propose_lessons.py (deterministic signal->suggestion translation; load-bearing test_application_guidance_always_warns_against_auto_write enforces the opt-in-only, never-auto-write discipline). READS the user's .job-hunter/DECISIONS|LESSONS|OUTCOMES|REJECTED_IDEAS.md per the family workspace-contract; the workspace and its templates are owned by the orchestrator's init_workspace.py, not by this member. Local-only, no telemetry. Test fixtures build the .job-hunter scaffold directly rather than importing the orchestrator-owned init_workspace.py.
